form.formComment: Returns from a 35-day let-up. At the latest run 6th of 10 at this track on March 6 over 1400m, 6 len behind P M Boggy with 54kg at $41.90. The run before that sat behind the speed prior to fading second last of 12 at this track on February 6 over 900m, 12 len behind Arc Of Life carrying 53kg at $19.80. Not doing enough of late to threaten.

form.formComment: Comes off a 38 day let-up. Last start eased back early on 6th of 11 at this track on March 3 over 1400m, 12 len behind Teruken Yumimizuki carrying 56kg at $28.90. The run before that 5th of 11 at this track on January 1 over 1400m, 8 len behind Gladsheim with 56kg at $33.70. Can do a lot better than that last run.

form.formComment: Resuming after a three-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation fifth of 9 at this track January 3 over 1400m, 6 len behind Oriko Deauville with 54kg at $37.60. On debut ran last of 7 at this track October 17 over 1400m, 19 len behind Ageha Shinwa carrying 54kg at $76.20. This is an ideal race to kick off. Top hope.
